description.p: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

When you hit a creature with a ranged attack using this weapon, you can force the target to make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target is Frightened of you until the end of your next turn. In addition, you gain an extra +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls against creatures that are Frightened.
This simple quarterstaff can be combined with its separate head by using a free action and speaking its command word. The weapon is magical for purposes of overcoming damage reduction.

Transformation: As a free action, you can speak the command word to attach or detach the weapon head, transforming this quarterstaff into a {{parent}} or back into a quarterstaff. The weapon retains its magical properties in any form.
Magical Weapon: Attack and damage rolls made with this weapon are considered magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.
A sacred blade born of moonlight and mercy, blessed by Eilistraee, the Dark Maiden. It is a weapon of grace, not of slaughter. It redeems where others would only destroy.
Magical Weapon: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
Moonlight: In the dark, the weapon emits soft moonlight when wielded. (15ft normal sight, 15ft dim)
Symbol of Redemption: If the wielder were to inflict a killing blow on a creature, he/she may choose to render the creature unconscious instead of killing it.
Blessing of the Moon: Once per long rest, the wielder can, as a bonus action, fill the weapon with the power of Eilistraee’s Dance. For 1 minute, the weapon gains the following property:
Upon a hit, it deals an extra 1d4 radiant damage.
Against Aberrations and fiends, it then deals an extra 1d6 radiant damage
This long glaive has a black steel blade engraved with crimson runes. The weapon radiates a soft reddish glow when danger threatens.
The handle is wrapped in dark red leather, and at the top, just below the blade, hangs a red and silver knight chess piece, the holy symbol of the order.
This magic weapon warns you of danger. While the weapon is on your person, you have advantage on initiative rolls.

You and any of your companions within 30 feet of you can't be surprised, except when incapacitated by something other than nonmagical sleep. The weapon magically awakens you and your companions within range if any of you are sleeping naturally when combat begins.
The blade pulsates crimson red when danger is near, even within magical darkness.
Tactical Insight: Once per long rest, you can give yourself advantage on a single skill check that requires your leadership.
Mark of the Red Knight: Once per long rest when initiative is rolled, you may choose to use this ability to give yourself or an ally +5 on an initiative roll.
